entered_group_job: You have successfully joined the group
you_have_job: You can't join or start a new job, because you already have a job
max_players_reached_for_this_job: You can't do this job right now, because there are too many players doing it!
successfully_started_job: You have started a new job! Drive to the marked locations on the map
cant_start_job_no_space: There is no available space to take out a job vehicle!
not_holding_container: You are not moving a container!
group_is_full: The group is full and cannot accept more members!
not_in_gruppe_6_territory: You are not in the Gruppe6 territory!
job_ended_return_vehicle: The job has ended! Please return the vehicle to complete the process.
this_bin_is_empty: This container has been already emptied out
trash_collected_return_veh: Nice work! Now return to the garbage depot marked on the map and return the truck!
no_more_trash_recycle: There is no more trash to be collected and recycled!
trash_collected_go_recycle: Trash bag collected, bring it to the recycling line!
trash_bag_recycled: You have successfully recycled a trash bag!
garbage_collected_drive_recycle: You have collected the garbage, now drive to the recycling center!
not_in_driver_seat: You need to be in the driver seat!
task_return_job_vehicle: Return the job vehicle to the garbage depot headquarters
task_drive_to_location: Drive to the marked location on the map
job_vehicle_trunk_busy: The job vehicle trunk is being used by another player, please wait!
notify_found_items: You have found valuable items in the dumpster!
notify_no_items_found: No valuable items found in the dumpster.
inventory_no_space_desc: You don't have any space left in your inventory

warehouse.stock_description: Here you can view current inventory stock amount of each package type category. Different package categories are needed for different job types. If there is no stock or too much stock for that package type, you will not be able to start that job.

stock_management.title: Stock Management
stock_management.description: Monitor and track your inventory levels in real-time

inventory_tracking.title: Inventory Tracking
inventory_tracking.description: Track stock levels and get alerts for low inventory

stock_rotation.title: Stock Rotation
stock_rotation.description: Efficiently manage stock rotation and inventory flow

home.group_job_description: Start a new job and invite others to work together
home.groups_description: Join existing groups and work as a team
home.job_header_descriptions: Looking for a stable, rewarding job? Join the Los Santos Sanitation Department! As a garbage collector, you'll play a crucial role in keeping our city clean and vibrant. Enjoy competitive pay, excellent benefits, and the satisfaction of making a difference every day. Work with a dedicated team, operate state-of-the-art equipment, and experience the dynamic streets of Los Santos from a unique perspective. No prior experience required; we provide all necessary training.

competitive_pay.title: Competitive Pay
competitive_pay.description: Earn great wages with performance bonuses

flexible_hours.title: Flexible Hours
flexible_hours.description: Work when it suits you best

career_growth.title: Career Growth
career_growth.description: Advance through skill levels and unlock new abilities

team_environment.title: Team Environment
team_environment.description: Work solo or join forces with other operators

jobStart.group_kick_player_confirm: Are you sure you want to kick this member?
jobStart.want_to_start_job: Would you like to start this job?

groups.subtitle: Find and join available job groups
groups.no_groups_description: There are currently no groups available to join. Try creating a new group instead.

stock.garbage_center_description: This progress bar represents how much garbage stock is currently in the garbage hq and what percentage of the space is still free for new trash to be collected.
stock.recycle_center_description: This progress bar represents how much garbage stock is currently in the recycling center and what percentage of the space is still free for new trash to be delivered.

selectJobs.subtitle: Choose the type of delivery work you want to do

pickup.title: Pick Up Jobs
pickup.description: Collect packages from various locations and deliver them back to the warehouse

delivery.title: Delivery Jobs
delivery.description: Deliver packages from the warehouse to various locations around the city

selectJobs.want_to_start_job: Would you like to start this delivery job?
selectJobs.no_jobs: No jobs available at this time

jobTypes.select_type_subtitle: Choose your preferred waste management service
jobTypes.recycling_job_description: Sort and process recyclable materials at the recycling center
jobTypes.collect_job_description: Collect waste from various locations around the city
